logo.subtitle: INTEGRACIONES & AUTOMATIZACIONES
logo.style: White geometric/futuristic letters on #2D144D to #4B2E83 gradient background.

typography.installation: Use Fontsource or Google Fonts to import Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and Geist/Manrope (body).

rules.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-white
rules.labels: text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400

sidebar.design: Clean, minimal. Active state uses subtle purple background (#F5F3FF) with #2D144D text and a left-border accent.

topbar.design: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/70) with a delicate bottom border.

cards.style: Flat surface, very subtle border (1px solid #EAEAEA), crisp typography. No heavy shadows unless hovered (Linear style).

kanban_board.card: bg-white dark:bg-[#202020] p-4 rounded-md shadow-sm border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 cursor-grab hover:border-[#6D4CC9] transition-all
kanban_board.tags: px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded bg-[#F5F3FF] text-[#2D144D]

tables.style: Stripe/Notion style. Borderless rows, subtle gray headers (text-xs uppercase), compact padding (py-3 px-4), hover state on rows (bg-slate-50).

kpi_widgets.style: Minimalist. Value is large (text-3xl font-semibold text-[#2D144D]), label is muted (text-sm text-slate-500). Sparkline chart or trend indicator (+5.2%) in success color.

ai_chat.style: Conversational UI. User bubbles: bg-[#F5F3FF] text-[#2D144D]. AI bubbles: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700. Markdown support. Smooth transitions.

login_page.layout: Split screen or centered modal. Left/Background: Deep gradient from #2D144D to #4B2E83 with subtle mesh/noise texture. Right/Foreground: Clean white card, Google OAuth button prominent.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, consistent sizing (w-5 h-5 for sidebar, w-4 h-4 for inline).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts to ensure maximum customization.

Implement Shadcn UI for complex interactives (Dropdowns, Dialogs, Selects, Tables) but heavily customize them to match the exact 'Linear/Stripe' flat, high-contrast aesthetic. Remove default Vercel look.
Data Visualizations: Use Shadcn Charts (Recharts). Primary line/bar color should be #6D4CC9, secondary #A38BFF.
Ensure `data-testid` is added to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, kanban cards) in kebab-case format.
Implement the Kanban drag-and-drop using standard HTML5 drag and drop or a lightweight library (e.g., dnd-kit) if required by the stack.
For the AI Process Mapping visualizer, consider a canvas/flow diagram approach (like React Flow) styled cleanly with the brand's purple accents.

The primary color #2D144D should be used sparingly for primary actions and key typography to maintain a premium feel. Do not overuse it as a massive background block in the main app interface (except for the sidebar active states or login background).
